raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "The statement serves as an affirmative declaration of intentional self-transformation, combining self-empowerment, identity redefinition, and temporal integration of past, present, and future selves.",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "Identity is malleable and can be consciously re-coded.",
    "Some current roles are unnecessary and can be released.",
    "Self-love is compatible with ongoing personal evolution.",
    "The future self can be accessed and embodied in the present moment."
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "The statement is internally coherent as a series of self-affirmations that progress logically from redefinition (re-coding) to release (roles) to acceptance (loving) to integration (future self now). The temporal flow—real time, evolving, now—is consistent.",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": [
    "The individual feels stuck in outdated identities or roles.",
    "They are engaged in a therapeutic or self-development process.",
    "They believe in the possibility of conscious identity change.",
    "They are willing to tolerate the ambiguity of evolving selfhood."
  ],
  "conditions_for_misleading": [
    "Identity change is implied to be solely a matter of declaration rather than sustained practice.",
    "The statement could discourage acceptance of present limitations or necessary social roles.",
    "It may falsely suggest that past experiences can be fully erased rather than integrated.",
    "If used without therapeutic support, it could bypass necessary grief or resistance."
  ]
}

parsed_json.communicative_function: The statement serves as an affirmative declaration of intentional self-transformation, combining self-empowerment, identity redefinition, and temporal integration of past, present, and future selves.
implicit_claims: Identity is malleable and can be consciously re-coded.
Some current roles are unnecessary and can be released.
Self-love is compatible with ongoing personal evolution.
The future self can be accessed and embodied in the present moment.
parsed_json.coherence_assessment: The statement is internally coherent as a series of self-affirmations that progress logically from redefinition (re-coding) to release (roles) to acceptance (loving) to integration (future self now). The temporal flow—real time, evolving, now—is consistent.
conditions_for_usefulness: The individual feels stuck in outdated identities or roles.
They are engaged in a therapeutic or self-development process.
They believe in the possibility of conscious identity change.
They are willing to tolerate the ambiguity of evolving selfhood.
conditions_for_misleading: Identity change is implied to be solely a matter of declaration rather than sustained practice.
The statement could discourage acceptance of present limitations or necessary social roles.
It may falsely suggest that past experiences can be fully erased rather than integrated.
If used without therapeutic support, it could bypass necessary grief or resistance.
